emails.subject: working on Holiday (Monday Dec. 24th)
emails.body: working on Holiday (Monday Dec. 24th) Kevin asked that one scheduler work on Monday to field any scheduling questions that might come up. I was the lucky candidate. Please put me on the payroll list w/ the other Hourly guys that had to work on the Company holiday. Thanks, Pat

emails.subject: working on Holiday (Monday Dec. 24th)

emails.subject: RE: working on Holiday (Monday Dec. 24th)
emails.body: RE: working on Holiday (Monday Dec. 24th) Sorry to hear that....I will get you taken care of Don, I also need the list of people who are working the xmas holiday so that I can get them added in the system as well. Hope your holiday was a good one...see you soon, Tjae
